grant_title: Funding Opportunities and Programmatic Insights for Advancing Shared Use Paths, Trails, and Greenways in New Jersey
project_area: Shared use paths, trails, and greenways development and funding
demographic_requirements: Not explicitly stated; likely open to all demographics but focused on community well-being and accessibility
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include state agencies, local governments, non-profit organizations, and private sector entities involved in trail and shared-use path development in New Jersey. The report provides insights into funding opportunities and best practices for advancing such projects.
